introduction.p: The bill at a restaurant came and Alex offered to pay for the whole table. We are not sure what the bill was, but it was at least \$50\text{.} Alex added a tip, and the total came to \$160\text{.} We are sure that he added at least 20\% tip. What might the original bill total have been before tip?

statement.p: Write an inequality to represent this situation, using x to represent the bill total before tip was added.
Solve this inequality. Whats the most the bill could have been before tip?
Use interval notation to express what the bill could have been before tip was added.
